title: github jcob-bd/notebooklm-mcp-cliを調べて、kernel/FUGUEに活用できるか検証せよ。/kernelで。
summary_text: no findings Residual risk: NotebookLM specificity is validated mostly by positive assertions, so a regression that adds both action labels in one run could slip unless exclusivity checks are added in [test-route-task-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-route-task-handoff.sh), [test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh), and workflow-dispatch snapshot variants in [test-resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-resolve-orchestration-context.sh).
